testcase.name: Registration › user can register a new account
Registration › duplicate email shows error
Registration › weak password shows validation error
Registration › registration form has no Organisation ID field
Registration › after registration hard-refresh does not grant dashboard access
Login › valid credentials redirect to dashboard
Login › wrong password shows error message
Login › access token is NOT stored in localStorage
Login › ?next param preserves redirect after login
Logout › logout clears session and redirects to login
Logout › accessing protected route after logout redirects to login
Session persistence › hard refresh preserves authenticated state via silent refresh
OAuth — Google › login page shows Google sign-in button

property.name: skip
property.value: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID not configured — OAuth button not rendered

testcase.name: OAuth — Google › clicking Google button redirects to backend OAuth endpoint

property.name: skip
property.value: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID not configured — OAuth button not rendered

testcase.name: OAuth — Google › OAuth callback with error redirects to login with message
OAuth — Google › OAuth callback without token redirects to login
OAuth — Google › login page shows error banner for OAuth state mismatch
OAuth — Google › login page shows generic error banner for OAuth provider error
Media upload › MediaUploader drop zone is visible on person page
Media upload › file input accepts image MIME types
Media upload › uploading an image shows it in the progress queue
Media upload › gallery is visible on person page
Global search › search bar is present in navigation
Global search › typing in search bar shows results
Global search › search shows "No results" for nonsense query
Global search › Enter key navigates to full results page
Results page › search results page renders
Results page › sort dropdown changes sort order
Results page › birth year filter works
Relationship finder › relationship finder panel renders on tree page
Tree creation › can create a new family tree
Tree creation › tree name is required
Person management › can add a person to the tree
Person management › can edit a person
Person management › tree canvas renders on tree page
Person management › layout toggle buttons are visible
